keyPoints: EDA (Exploratory Data Analysis) is a crucial step in data visualization
Main Graphical Packages in R are ggplot2, base graphics, and Shiny
Pie Charts show proportions of categories in a dataset
Scatter Plots show the relationship between two variables
Line Plots show trends over time or across categories
Histograms display the distribution of a single variable
Box Plots show the distribution of multiple variables
Bar Plots compare categorical data across different groups
Other Graphs include heatmaps, treemaps, and scatterplot matrices
